2604.26689.title: Atomic-Probe Governance for Skill Updates in Compositional Robot Policies
2604.26689.paper_summary: Skill libraries in deployed robotic systems are continually updated through fine-tuning, fresh demonstrations, or domain adaptation, yet existing typed-composition methods (BLADE, SymSkill, Generative Skill Chaining) treat the library as frozen at test time and do not analyze how composition outcomes change when a skill is replaced. We introduce a paired-sampling cross-version swap protocol on robosuite manipulation tasks to characterize this dimension of compositional skill learning. On a dual-arm peg-in-hole task we discover a dominant-skill effect: one ECM achieves 86.7% atomic success rate while every other ECM is at or below 26.7%, and whether this dominant ECM enters a composition shifts the success rate by up to +50pp. We characterize the boundary on a simpler pick task where all atomic policies saturate at 100% and the effect is undefined. Across three tasks we further find that off-policy behavioral distance metrics fail to identify the dominant ECM, ruling out the natural cheap predictor. We propose an atomic-quality probe and a Hybrid Selector combining per-skill probes (zero per-decision cost) with selective composition revalidation (full cost), and characterize its Pareto frontier on 144 skill-update decisions. On T6 the atomic-only probe sits 23pp below full revalidation (64.6% vs 87.5% oracle match) at zero per-decision cost; a Hybrid Selector with m=10 closes most of that gap to ~12pp at 46% of full-revalidation cost. On the cross-task average over 144 events, atomic-only is within 3pp of full revalidation under a mixed-oracle caveat. The atomic-quality probe is, to our knowledge, the first principled, deployment-ready primitive for skill-update governance in compositional robot policies.
2604.26689.paper_summary_zh: 已部署的機器人系統中的技能庫通過微調、新的示範或領域適應不斷更新，然而現有的類型組合方法（BLADE、SymSkill、Generative Skill Chaining）在測試時將庫視為凍結，並未分析當技能被替換時組合結果如何變化。我們在robosuite操作任務上引入了一種配對抽樣的跨版本交換協議，以表徵這一組合技能學習的維度。在一個雙臂插釘任務中，我們發現了一種主導技能效應：一個ECM達到了86.7%的原子成功率，而其他每個ECM的成功率均在或低於26.7%，並且這個主導ECM是否進入組合會使成功率變化高達+50pp。我們在一個更簡單的拾取任務中表徵了邊界，所有原子策略的成功率飽和在100%，而效果則未定義。在三個任務中，我們進一步發現，離線策略行為距離度量無法識別主導ECM，排除了自然的廉價預測器。我們提出了一種原子質量探測器和一種混合選擇器，將每個技能的探測器（每次決策成本為零）與選擇性組合重新驗證（全成本）結合起來，並在144次技能更新決策上表徵其帕累托邊界。在T6中，僅原子探測器的表現比完全重新驗證低23pp（64.6%對87.5%預測匹配），且每次決策成本為零；一個m=10的混合選擇器將這一差距縮小到約12pp，成本為完全重新驗證的46%。在144次事件的跨任務平均中，僅原子探測器在混合預測的警告下與完全重新驗證相差不超過3pp。據我們所知，原子質量探測器是第一個原則性、準備部署的原始工具，用於組合機器人政策中的技能更新治理。
2604.26689.author: Xue Qin et.al.
2604.26689.authors: Xue Qin, Simin Luan, John See, Cong Yang, Zhijun Li
